cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 01 / N0 无防护锚点
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: naked anchor with minute-quantized integration.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 02 / 九槽位权重覆盖
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: prove all nine slots and weights are part of aggregation.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 03 / 聚合公式非线性
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: insulation aggregation must show diminishing returns.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 04 / 漏风弱点拖累
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: same-space weak-point assertions should reflect player-visible W_eff and survival-time penalties.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 05 / 物品属性范围校验
cases.notes: All wearable thermal insulation/windproof values are within [0,1].

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 06 / 无耐久字段校验
cases.notes: All wearable items are free of durability/condition style fields.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 07 / Tier-1 范围约束
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: tier-1 full set must remain inside its target protection range.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 08 / Tier-2 范围约束
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: tier-2 full set must remain inside its target protection range.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 09 / Tier-1 中位数锚点
cases.notes: ExposureCoverageSuite: tier-1 anchor with locked env, locked wetness, and isolated exposure semantics.

cases.name: ExposureCoverageSuite / Case 10 / Tier-2 中位数锚点

asserts.name: UI_BIND / exposure hypo100 default
asserts.notes: Guard rail: missing exposure.hypo100 must default to 100 and must not render as 0 while not incapacitated.

cases.notes: IndoorWarmExpSuite: minute-stepped indoor exponential recovery reaches the epsilon band within 4 hours.

cases.name: IndoorWarmExpSuite / Case IW-02 / 回暖效率倍率路径
cases.notes: IndoorWarmExpSuite: indoor heat source only changes recovery efficiency multiplier, not the write topology.

cases.notes: IndoorWarmExpSuite: already-normal indoor temperature should remain pinned at steady state.
